entries.title: Technical Paper on Moletronics
entries.description: Presented a national level technical paper on **Moletronics — An Invisible Technology** during my engineering studies.

entries.title: Teaching Fellow Students
entries.description: From my second year through graduation, self-learned subjects, clarified concepts with professors, and taught fellow students **Control Systems**, **Embedded Systems**, **Microprocessors**, and **Digital Signal Processing** — semester after semester, while working part-time to fund my education.

entries.title: First Coding Experience
entries.description: My first hands-on coding — wrote embedded code to flash into a robot for line following and object detection at the **Robosapiens** workshop.

entries.title: B.Tech Final Project — Healthcare Monitoring
entries.description: Designed a patient health care monitoring system using **Zigbee** protocol and **LTE** messaging to enable emergency alerts when caretakers are unavailable.

entries.title: B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering
entries.description: Completed my engineering degree in **Electronics and Communication Engineering**.

entries.title: PG Diploma — CDAC Kolkata
entries.description: Post Graduate Diploma in Embedded Systems Design with **Grade A**. My project was a **GPIO Device Driver on Linux** for ARM to control motors and LEDs.

entries.title: Continental Automotive
entries.description: Started my career at **Continental Automotive** in the Vehicle Dynamics business unit. Automated the resource analysis process using **Perl** — extracting data, generating reports, and updating internal webpages.

entries.title: MKC1 Braking System — Worldwide Responsibility
entries.description: Took worldwide responsibility for control function resource estimation across Asia, Germany, and the USA for [MK100/MKC1](https://www.continental-automotive.com/) braking system products. Created the quotation database for new project estimations.

entries.title: First International Travel
entries.description: Traveled to Germany for the first time to prepare **MKC1 resource estimations** for **Ford**, **BMW**, and **Volvo** projects and built the TB2015 database.

entries.title: Git Ambassador
entries.description: Became a **Git Ambassador**, training a 40-member team on GitHub workflows and best practices. Fully automated the end-to-end testing and reporting pipeline.

entries.title: TriCore Resource Estimation
entries.description: Extended the resource estimation Excel macro template (**.xlsm**) to support **TriCore** microcontroller project quotations — learned VBA and Excel macro automation on the job.

entries.title: GLIWA T1 Timing Analysis
entries.description: Spent 3 months in Frankfurt integrating **GLIWA T1** timing analysis into the RTM component for both **Vector OS** and **Elektrobit OS**. Analyzed timing parameters for vision control software across all global projects.

entries.title: MKC2 Braking Product Support
entries.description: Developed and improved the quotation template for the new [MKC2](https://www.continental-automotive.com/) braking product — extending the Excel macro tooling to support resource estimation for the new product line.

entries.title: Technical Architect & Python Tool
entries.description: Developed a **Python application** to extract detailed timing data from GLIWA T1 enabled software — my first experience with Python and databases. It became the standard tool for worldwide timing analysis.

entries.title: Train the Trainer & Knowledge Transfer
entries.description: Participated in the **Train the Trainer** program. Trained **4+ deputies** across teams, ensuring complete knowledge transfer of all responsibilities and helping colleagues take ownership before transitioning.

entries.title: Marquardt GmbH, Germany
entries.description: After 6.5 years at Continental and 15 spot awards, packed my life into two suitcases and moved to Germany. Joined **Marquardt GmbH** as an Advanced Software Development Engineer, working on the SPLE platform build system.

entries.title: RAM/ROM Reporting & Build Automation
entries.description: Introduced automated **RAM/ROM consumption reporting** into the build process — giving project teams resource visibility for the first time. Co-developed build extensions that replaced numerous manual scripts, saving approximately one day per project per variant.

entries.title: Replacing Licensed Tools with Python
entries.description: Built custom Python tooling to generate **ODX/PDX/OUC** artifacts and **vFlashpacks**, completely replacing expensive Vector tool licenses and eliminating recurring annual costs.

entries.title: SPLE Platform Trainer & AI Adoption
entries.description: Co-conducted **10+ SPLE Platform Basic Training** sessions. Co-introduced AI-assisted development workflows, already adopted by teams achieving up to **85% code coverage** for legacy components in a single day.
